source.title: Heimao Complaint Platform 2024 Annual E-commerce Report

extractions.claim: Chinese e-commerce complaints on Heimao exceeded 1.28 million in 2024, up 21.5% YoY
extractions.evidence: 2024年电商领域有效投诉总量超128万件，同比2023年上涨21.51%。双十一期间单日投诉峰值超过5000件。

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao's official 2024 annual report published Feb 2025

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo, Taobao/Tmall, JD, and Douyin account for 83.3% of all e-commerce complaints on Heimao
extractions.evidence: 拼多多、淘宝（含天猫）、京东、抖音四大电商平台投诉占电商领域总投诉量的83.3%

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo responded to only 20% of Heimao complaints; Taobao/Tmall responded to 5%
extractions.evidence: 头部投诉商家中，拼多多回复了20%的投诉，淘宝（含天猫）只回复了5%的投诉

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao 2024 annual report. Note: Low response rates common for large platforms

extractions.claim: Top complaint categories: customer service (40%+), mismatched products (~15%), refused refunds (~15%)
extractions.evidence: 客服问题是电商投诉中最突出的因素，占比超过40%。货不对板和退货不退款的投诉也分别占据了15%左右

verification.verifier_notes: Aggregate across all platforms, not Pinduoduo-specific
